headline.purpose: Primary section titles and card headers.

body.purpose: General interface text and description logs.

shadows.name: Halo Glow
shadows.purpose: Soft, tinted shadow for cards and active inputs.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Transitions for hover effects and modal entrances.

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #2F2738; color: #FFFDF9; border: none; border-radius: 12px; padding: 12px 24px; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s ease, transform 0.1s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: oklch(0.18 0.03 290); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { background: transparent; color: #2F2738; border: 1.5px solid #ECE6F2; border-radius: 12px; padding: 12px 24px; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background-color: #F5EFFA; border-color: #2F2738; }

components.name: Live Badge
components.description: Indicates an active state or live check-in.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 8px; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; } .ds-badge-live { background-color: #D0F4DE; color: #2F2738; } .ds-dot-live { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background-color: #10B981; animation: ds-pulse 1.5s infinite; } @keyframes ds-pulse { 0% { transform: scale(0.95); opacity: 0.5; } 50% { transform: scale(1.2); opacity: 1; } 100% { transform: scale(0.95); opacity: 0.5; } }

components.name: Container Card
components.description: Standard card wrapper for event details.
components.html:
Event Title

Description of the event goes here.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FFFFFF; border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; border: 1px solid #ECE6F2; box-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(47,39,56,0.06), 0 2px 8px rgba(228,193,249,0.08); font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; } .ds-card-title { margin: 0 0 8px 0; color: #2F2738; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; } .ds-card-desc { margin: 0; color: #6B6377; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.5; }

narrative.overview: The Active Canvas represents vibrant, functional pastel blocks placed upon a warm milk canvas. The design expresses the structure, rhythm, and active motion of event organizing (specifically matching a dance studio/active movement vibe) while maintaining clean layout boundaries.
keyCharacteristics: Playful Contrast: Bold dark ink paired with pastel mint and lavender accent blocks.
Pill-like Shapes: Generous corner rounding (12px) making the UI feel friendly and touch-friendly.
Rhythmic Density: Well-spaced tables and controls designed to be readable on the move.

rules.name: The Accent Rarity Rule
rules.body: Primary Eggplant Ink and Warm Milk carry 90% of the screen weight. Fresh Mint and Soft Lavender must occupy <= 10% of any view, serving purely to draw focus to action points and badges.

rules.name: The Structural Shadow Rule
rules.body: Shadows must never be stark black or grey. They are tinted toward the eggplant/lavender background scale, ensuring a cohesive and clean glow.

dos: Do use Fresh Mint (#D0F4DE) exclusively for positive states (checked in, live session) and Soft Lavender (#E4C1F9) for neutral categories.
Do ensure body text maintains a contrast ratio of >= 4.5:1 against its background.
Do apply generous padding (24px) to cards to preserve 'The Active Canvas' airy aesthetic.
donts: Don't use sterile, thin spreadsheet borders (e.g. border-gray-200); always use the brand's Pale Lilac border (#ECE6F2).
Don't use sharp corners; every interactive component must have at least an 8px radius.
Don't apply gradients to text headers; use solid Eggplant Ink (#2F2738) for display text.
Don't animate image dimensions on hover. Animate background scaling or card shadows instead.
